MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge Ellen Chaitin., Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: GISELLE CASEY, #8098

LEO M. LAROCCA, Esq. appeared for plaintiff CLAREN ANGELO HERBERT, who was present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant DAVID SCIANDRI.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff CLAREN ANGELO HERBERT, and against the Defaulted Defendant DAVID SCIANDRI as follows:

DAMAGES 18,858.96; ATTY FEES $1250.00; COSTS $531.71

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
